```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";
import * as __rspack_external_path from "path";

// fs

// path

// ./index.js








it("should re-export used external namespaces without duplicating semantics", async () => {
  const mod = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ "./main.mjs");

  expect(mod.external1.readFile).toBe(__rspack_external_fs.readFile);
  expect(mod.external2.resolve).toBe(__rspack_external_path.resolve);
});

export { __rspack_external_fs as external1, __rspack_external_path as external2 };

```
